commands.review_summary:
The PR splits the Policy plugin doctor registration module into metadata, strictness, shared types/utilities, and scope-owned checks, while the current head also includes unrelated changes across plugins, scripts, and SDK tests.

PR surface: Source +231, Tests +295, Other +7. Total +533 across 43 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a structural refactor, not a reported bug. The review path is code/proof equivalence, and the current-head scope drift is visible from the live commit file list.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor cleanup is required because the protected PR currently carries unscoped non-policy changes and security-sensitive script edits beyond the stated refactor.

target.title: refactor(policy): split doctor modules
target.body:
## Summary

- Split policy doctor metadata, strictness comparison, shared types, and shared value readers out of `register.ts`.
- Move policy-area health-check factories under `doctor/scopes/`, with scope-owned findings helpers where applicable.
- Keep `register.ts` as the evaluation/orchestration module and preserve existing public re-exports for callers/tests.
- Address the ClawSweeper topology finding by moving shared doctor dependencies into leaf module `types.ts`, so scope modules no longer import through the `checks.ts` aggregator.

## Context

- Follow-up to openclaw/openclaw#89596 after it merged.
- Rebased onto upstream `main` at `6368c1173ccf48b379ea4668ff7fca461c7d44ed`.
- Current PR head: `789c0ce2cc61dd14479edd6b03fd40a7c918e626`.
- Structural only: no config schema/options, CLI flags, plugin API/contract, env vars, migrations, policy behavior, or runtime filtering changes.

## Structure

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  register["register.ts\nevaluation + orchestration"]
  checks["checks.ts\ncheck factory aggregator"]
  types["types.ts\nshared doctor dependency types"]
  metadata["metadata.ts\ncheck IDs + rule metadata"]
  strictness["strictness.ts\npolicy strictness comparisons"]
  utils["utils.ts\nshared value readers"]

  register --> checks
  register --> metadata
  register --> strictness
  register --> utils
  register --> types
  checks --> types
  checks --> scopes
  scopes --> types
  scopes --> metadata
  scopes --> utils

  subgraph scopes["doctor/scopes/ - policy-owned modules"]
    core["core.ts\npolicy file/hash/attestation"]
    channels["channels.ts\nchannels + ingress"]
    gateway["gateway.ts\ngateway checks + findings"]
    modelNetwork["model-network.ts\nMCP + models + network"]
    tools["tools.ts\nagents/tools + TOOLS.md"]
    sandbox["sandbox.ts\nsandbox posture"]
    dataAuth["data-auth.ts\ndata/secrets/auth profiles"]
    execApprovals["exec-approvals.ts\nexec approvals evidence"]
  end
```

Review model: open `register.ts` for the policy evaluation flow, `checks.ts` for registration order, `types.ts` for shared dependency shapes, and `doctor/scopes/<area>.ts` for the checks and findings owned by one policy area.

## Scope Layout

- `metadata.ts`: check IDs, rule metadata, and sandbox container rule metadata.
- `strictness.ts`: policy strictness comparisons.
- `types.ts`: shared policy doctor dependency/evaluation types.
- `utils.ts`: shared policy value readers/path helpers.
- `checks.ts`: small check factory aggregator.
- `scopes/core.ts`: policy file, hash, attestation, and parse checks.
- `scopes/channels.ts`: channel provider and ingress checks.
- `scopes/gateway.ts`: gateway checks and gateway exposure findings.
- `scopes/model-network.ts`: MCP server, model provider, and network checks/findings.
- `scopes/tools.ts`: agent/tool posture and TOOLS.md metadata checks.
- `scopes/sandbox.ts`: sandbox mode/backend/container/browser checks.
- `scopes/data-auth.ts`: data handling, secrets, and auth profile checks.
- `scopes/exec-approvals.ts`: exec approvals artifact/posture checks.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
The policy doctor refactor should preserve existing policy evaluation, health-check registration, check IDs/order, and public metadata exports while moving code into scope-owned modules. The follow-up topology issue was that scope files imported a dependency type through `checks.ts`, creating a Madge cycle; this patch moves those shared types to leaf module `types.ts`.

Real environment tested:
WSL Ubuntu 24.04 root checkout at `/root/src/openclaw-89596-review`, source harness on PR head `789c0ce2cc61dd14479edd6b03fd40a7c918e626` rebased onto upstream `main` `6368c1173ccf48b379ea4668ff7fca461c7d44ed`. The policy behavior proof used the source extension command path with an isolated temp OpenClaw config and workspace, because this dev checkout's packaged root CLI does not load the source policy extension as `pnpm openclaw policy check`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `pnpm check:madge-import-cycles`
2. `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
3. `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts --reporter=dot`
4. `node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/checks.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/types.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/utils.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/channels.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/core.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/data-auth.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/exec-approvals.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/gateway.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/model-network.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/sandbox.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/tools.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts`
5. `node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/checks.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/types.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/utils.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/channels.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/core.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/data-auth.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/exec-approvals.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/gateway.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/model-network.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/sandbox.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/scopes/tools.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts`
6. `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`
7. Source harness: `policyCheckCommand({ cwd: tempWorkspace, json: true })` with isolated `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH`, enabled policy plugin config, and workspace `policy.jsonc`.

Evidence after fix:

```text
HEAD=789c0ce2cc61dd14479edd6b03fd40a7c918e626
BASE=6368c1173ccf48b379ea4668ff7fca461c7d44ed
Madge import cycle check: 0 cycle(s).
Test Files 3 passed (3)
Tests 277 passed (277)
All matched files use the correct format.
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
```

Policy source harness output:

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "checksRun": 63,
  "checksSkipped": 0,
  "findings": [],
  "policyPath": "policy.jsonc",
  "policyHash": "sha256:50280d76187fc37fb6965f90954af352e70c3e6d1ab892dc5ac0bb1c902d7b62",
  "workspaceHash": "sha256:9f0c2b4bea8e495d82b29534602041becdc1d65f098cac22fbc696630380691e"
}
exit_code=0
```

Observed result after fix:
The import-cycle check reports zero cycles, the focused policy doctor test suite passes on the refactored module layout, extension typecheck/lint/format/diff checks are clean, and the policy source command path emits a clean attestation with 63 checks run, zero skipped checks, and no findings.

What was not tested:
Packaged root `pnpm openclaw policy check` was not used because this dev checkout does not load the source policy extension as a root CLI command. Full local tooling-config Vitest is not used as proof from this WSL/root checkout because local PATH/chmod behavior causes unrelated environment-sensitive failures; the stale GitHub core-tooling failure was addressed by rebasing onto current `main` and will be verified by CI on this head.

## Validation

- `pnpm check:madge-import-cycles`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/metadata.test.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/strictness.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ...`
- `node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ...`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`
- Source harness `policyCheckCommand({ cwd: tempWorkspace, json: true })` with isolated policy config/workspace.

## Size Notes

- Diff against current `main`: 17 files changed, 2,464 insertions, 2,168 deletions.
- `register.ts`: 5,570 LOC after split.
- Check/finding scope modules:
  - `checks.ts`: 26 LOC.
  - `types.ts`: 35 LOC.
  - `scopes/*.ts`: 1,261 LOC total.
  - largest scope files: `gateway.ts` 333 LOC, `model-network.ts` 232 LOC, `tools.ts` 191 LOC.
- Other modules:
  - `metadata.ts`: 543 LOC.
  - `strictness.ts`: 270 LOC.
  - `utils.ts`: 63 LOC.
- Companion tests:
  - `metadata.test.ts`: 161 LOC.
  - `strictness.test.ts`: 44 LOC.
